title: Kyiv: Update: Kyiv receives response from Trump to Zelensky's plea for air...
title_en: Kyiv: Update: Kyiv receives response from Trump to Zelensky's plea for air...

description: Update: Kyiv receives response from Trump to Zelensky's plea for air defenses. "It's a technical matter, so we won't go into the details," Dmytro Lytvyn, adviser to President Zelensky, told reporters on June 4. Previously, Zelensky sent Trump an urgent letter on May 26 warning of Ukraine's critical air defense shortage.

title: Donetsk: Drone strike

description: 'First such operation in modern history' — Ukraine destroys Russia's drone base at occupied Donetsk Airport. "A decision was made to carry out systematic preemptive strikes that will disrupt enemy launches and reduce the number of enemy drones that will once again fly to attack kindergartens, high-rise buildings, and hospitals."

title: Ukraine is ready to exchange prisoners of war on the principle of...
title_en: Ukraine is ready to exchange prisoners of war on the principle of...
title_uk: Україна готова до обміну військовополоненими за принципом...
description: Ukraine is ready to exchange prisoners of war on the principle of "all for all", and this can be a good prologue to the end of the war. Serious steps must be taken to return civilians and children who were taken away during the war. It is necessary to determine what the future will be for all future generations of Ukrainians and Russians.
description_en: Ukraine is ready to exchange prisoners of war on the principle of "all for all", and this can be a good prologue to the end of the war. Serious steps must be taken to return civilians and children who were taken away during the war. It is necessary to determine what the future will be for all future generations of Ukrainians and Russians.
description_uk: Україна готова до обміну військовополонених за принципом “всіх на всіх”, і це може стати хорошим прологом до закінчення війни. Треба зробити серйозні кроки для повернення цивільних та дітей, які були вивезені за війну. Треба визначити, яким буде майбутнє для усіх наступних поколінь українців та росіян.

title: The world is not tired of Ukraine, which you have been counting on...
title_en: The world is not tired of Ukraine, which you have been counting on...
title_uk: Світ не втомився від України, на яку ви так розраховували...
description: The world is not tired of Ukraine, which you have been counting on for a long time. But even those in the global world who help you circumvent sanctions and keep the economy afloat are tired of Russia. You can't help but notice it. After 26 years, old age began to take its toll. The further you go, the more tired you will be. We have seen intelligence documents that you are currently considering war plans for 2027 and...
description_en: The world is not tired of Ukraine, which you have been counting on for a long time. But even those in the global world who help you circumvent sanctions and keep the economy afloat are tired of Russia. You can't help but notice it. After 26 years, old age began to take its toll. The further you go, the more tired you will be. We have seen intelligence documents that you are currently considering war plans for 2027 and...
description_uk: У світу немає втоми від України, на яку ви довго розраховували. А от від Росії є втома навіть у тих в глобальному світі, хто допомагає вам обходити санкції та підтримувати на плаву економіку. Ви не можете цього не помічати. Після 26 років старість почала брати своє. Чим далі, тим більшою буде втома і від вас. Ми бачили документи від розвідки, що ви зараз розглядаєте плани війни ще й на 2027 і...

title: Kyiv: 'Enough of the war' — Zelensky throws down gauntlet to Putin in open...
title_en: Kyiv: 'Enough of the war' — Zelensky throws down gauntlet to Putin in open...
title_uk: Київ: «Досить війни» — Зеленський кидає Путіну рукавичку у відкритому...
description: 'Enough of the war' — Zelensky throws down gauntlet to Putin in open letter. "Almost half of your 26 years of power in Russia you have spent in the war against Ukraine," Zelensky wrote to Russian President Vladimir Putin. "Whatever you say about NATO, geopolitics and the Russian language, this war is your personal choice — a war without a real reason. This is how history will remember it."
description_en: 'Enough of the war' — Zelensky throws down gauntlet to Putin in open letter. "Almost half of your 26 years of power in Russia you have spent in the war against Ukraine," Zelensky wrote to Russian President Vladimir Putin. "Whatever you say about NATO, geopolitics and the Russian language, this war is your personal choice — a war without a real reason. This is how history will remember it."

title: Strike confirmed

description: Putin says Oreshnik missile was fired against Ukraine to "conveniently observe impact" Russian ruler Vladimir Putin has stated that the Oreshnik was fired against Ukraine to observe how the warheads were dispersed, claiming this will inform future decisions on full-scale use of the missile. title: Casualties reported
title_en: Casualties reported
description: On June 4, Ukraine honors the memory of children whose lives were cut short as a result of Russia's armed aggression against Ukraine. As a result of Russia's armed aggression against Ukraine, at least 707 Ukrainian children were killed, 2,548 were injured, and 2,317 are considered missing. More than 20,000 Ukrainian children were illegally deported or forcibly relocated by Russia. Only 2,212 children managed to return home. These...
description_en: On June 4, Ukraine honors the memory of children whose lives were cut short as a result of Russia's armed aggression against Ukraine. As a result of Russia's armed aggression against Ukraine, at least 707 Ukrainian children were killed, 2,548 were injured, and 2,317 are considered missing. More than 20,000 Ukrainian children were illegally deported or forcibly relocated by Russia. Only 2,212 children managed to return home. These...
description_uk: 4 червня Україна вшановує пам’ять дітей, чиє життя було обірване внаслідок збройної агресії Росії проти України. Внаслідок збройної агресії Росії проти України щонайменше 707 українських дітей були вбиті, 2548 – поранені, 2317 – вважаються зниклими безвісти. Понад 20 тисяч українських дітей були незаконно депортовані або примусово переміщені Росією. Лише 2212 дітей вдалося повернути додому. Ці...

title: Crimea: Attack attack
title_en: Crimea: Attack attack
description: Ukraine strikes Russian patrol ship in Sea of Azov, confirms damage to St. Petersburg oil terminal. The vessel, measuring nearly 50 meters in length, was struck near the settlement of Iurkine in Russian-occupied Crimea, Unmanned Systems Forces commander Robert "Magyar" Brovdi said on Telegram.
description_en: Ukraine strikes Russian patrol ship in Sea of Azov, confirms damage to St. Petersburg oil terminal. The vessel, measuring nearly 50 meters in length, was struck near the settlement of Iurkine in Russian-occupied Crimea, Unmanned Systems Forces commander Robert "Magyar" Brovdi said on Telegram.

title: Crimea: "SCORPIO". The creation of a new special unit was officially...

description: "SCORPIO". The creation of a new special unit was officially presented by the Military Law and Order Service in the Armed Forces of Ukraine ⚡️ "SCORPION" - the rapid response and sudden action department of the zonal departments of the Military Law and Order Service. Modern challenges require fast, professional and decisive actions. The "SCORPION" unit was created as part of the VSP specifically to respond to threats of increased level of danger....
description_en: "SCORPIO". The creation of a new special unit was officially presented by the Military Law and Order Service in the Armed Forces of Ukraine ⚡️ "SCORPION" - the rapid response and sudden action department of the zonal departments of the Military Law and Order Service. Modern challenges require fast, professional and decisive actions. The "SCORPION" unit was created as part of the VSP specifically to respond to threats of increased level of danger....
description_uk: "СКОРПІОН". Створення нового спецпідрозділу офіційно презентувала Військова служба правопорядку у Збройних Силах України ⚡️ «СКОРПІОН» — відділення швидкого реагування та раптової дії зональних відділів Військової служби правопорядку. Сучасні виклики вимагають швидких, професійних і рішучих дій. Саме для реагування на загрози підвищеного рівня небезпеки у складі ВСП створено підрозділ «СКОРПІОН»....

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
title_en: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Russia has changed its air strike tactics: more and more missiles are breaking through the Ukrainian air defense, CNN Izdanie writes that Moscow terrorists first launch large groups of cheap drones, then ballistic missiles and cruise missiles. This overloads the air defense system and increases the probability that some of the missiles will reach the targets. At the same time, analysts believe that the increase in air terror is also connected with the problems of the Russian Federation on...
description_en: Russia has changed its air strike tactics: more and more missiles are breaking through the Ukrainian air defense, CNN Izdanie writes that Moscow terrorists first launch large groups of cheap drones, then ballistic missiles and cruise missiles. This overloads the air defense system and increases the probability that some of the missiles will reach the targets. At the same time, analysts believe that the increase in air terror is also connected with the problems of the Russian Federation on...
description_uk: рф изменила тактику воздушных ударов: все больше ракет прорывают украинскую ПВО, — CNN Издание пишет, что московские террористы сначала запускают большие группы дешевых дронов, затем — баллистику и крылатые ракеты. Это перегружает систему ПВО и увеличивает вероятность того, что часть ракет достигнет целей. При этом аналитики считают, что усиление воздушного террора связано и с проблемами рф на...

title_uk: 1️⃣2️⃣Літній туристичний сезон в Одесі - можна, якщо бути уважним...
description: 1️⃣2️⃣Summer tourist season in Odesa - you can, if you're careful The coast of Odesa is now, in fact, the only place in Ukraine to relax by the sea. Since enemy UAVs and missiles regularly fly into the city from the sea, not only crabs and mussels can be found in the water, but also the wreckage of downed drones and sea mines. However, this does not particularly frighten tourists, so the region is preparing to welcome guests. About housing prices and...

However, this does not particularly frighten tourists, so the region is preparing to welcome guests. About housing prices and...
description_uk: 1️⃣2️⃣Літній туристичний сезон в Одесі – можна, якщо обережно Узбережжя Одещини — зараз, фактично, єдине місце в Україні для відпочинку біля моря. Оскільки на місто з моря регулярно летять ворожі БПЛА і ракети, у воді можна знайти не лише крабів та мідій, а й уламки збитих дронів та морські міни. Втім туристів це не особливо лякає, тому регіон готується зустрічати гостей. Про ціни на житло та...
